customizations.summary: Split .env loading try/catch — log chmod and read failures separately
customizations.reason: Original empty catch {} swallowed all errors including chmod failures, leaving bot token potentially world-readable. Now logs warnings for non-ENOENT errors.

customizations.summary: assertSendable now fails closed — throws on realpathSync error instead of returning
customizations.reason: CRITICAL: Original returned silently on FS errors, bypassing the exfiltration guard. Attacker exploiting symlink races could send access.json or .env over Telegram.

customizations.summary: Corrupt access.json recovery defaults to 'disabled' instead of 'pairing'
customizations.reason: Original reset to dmPolicy:'pairing' on corruption, allowing anyone to trigger pairing codes. Now defaults to most restrictive policy. Operator must explicitly re-enable.

customizations.summary: uncaughtException handler now exits process instead of continuing
customizations.reason: Node.js docs warn against resuming after uncaughtException. Running on corrupted state risks unpredictable security gate behavior.

customizations.summary: mentionPatterns regex errors now logged instead of silently swallowed
customizations.reason: Original empty catch {} hid broken patterns. Users had no way to know their mention config was silently doing nothing.

customizations.summary: .env parser restricted to TELEGRAM_ prefix and strips surrounding quotes
customizations.reason: Original accepted any \w+ key, allowing injection of arbitrary env vars (NODE_OPTIONS, PATH) via compromised .env file. Also handles quoted values correctly.
Skills and configure command are self-documenting.
Attribution in customizations.json and plugin.json. Original Apache-2.0 license noted in package.json.
Generated on install via bun install in start script.
